title: La nuit fantastique
writer: Louis Chavance, Maurice Henry, Henri Jeanson
actors: Fernand Gravey, Micheline Presle, Saturnin Fabre
plot: Denis is distracted: he's studying all day for philosophy exams and working all night at the flower market; plus, whenever he closes his eyes, he dreams of a mysterious woman in white. His girlfriend Nina is annoyed at him for his...
